message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have completed OCR resources: 190 full-frame 1fps OCR files and 951 dense 5fps bottom-crop OCR files. The ending OCR explicitly states the game was completed in 262 moves, so the final solution must contain exactly 262 command lines. Current candidate logs are noisy/undercounted and no validated /app/solution.txt has been written. The judge consensus is to run a prompt-flag-aware dense extractor using Panel 1's approach plus Panel 3's additional OCR fixes, then inspect the candidate count/content before writing any final file.",
  "plan": "Create and run `/app/work/dense_v5.py` over the 5fps bottom OCR. It will use prompt-presence (`had_prompt`) to build typed command segments, apply comprehensive OCR fixes including Panel 3 additions, filter game text with a common-command whitelist, deduplicate consecutive identical commands only, and write `/app/work/logs/dense_v5.log`. Then inspect the count and full log in chunks. This is intermediate validation; no final solution.txt will be written until the count is exactly 262 and the sequence is coherent.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/dense_v5.py <<'PY'
import glob, os, re

bottom5=sorted(glob.glob('/app/work/bottom5/frame_*.txt'), key=lambda p:int(os.path.basename(p).split('_')[1].split('.')[0]))

fixes={
    'gY':'y','Y':'y','G':'again','g':'again',
    'move,':'move rug','open tra':'open trap',
    'ulysse':'ulysses','ulyss':'ulysses',
    'pu,':'put','pu':'put',
    'Dopen':'open','dopen':'open',
    'elose':'close','ceage':'cage','eage':'cage','ca_':'cage','ca':'cage',
    'mirro':'mirror',
    'temp':'temple','tem':'temple','tem_':'temple',
    'rin':'ring','dro':'drop',
    'get all fr':'get all from cage','get all from _':'get all from cage','get all from ca_':'get all from cage',
    'get a rom Cage':'get all from cage',
    'get lamp,clove':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,sc':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,screw':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver',
    'put torch,scr':'put torch,screwdriver','put torch,screw':'put torch,screwdriver',
    'get huge, tor':'get huge,torch','get huge,torc':'get huge,torch','get nuge,torcn':'get huge,torch','get huge,tor':'get huge,torch',
    'get egg,sow':'get egg,sword,lamp','get egg, sword,1':'get egg,sword,lamp',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,go':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg, golden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,gold':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, Jade ,cup,egg,goiden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'Wind ac':'wind canary','Wind canary':'wind canary','win':'wind canary','win_':'wind canary',
    '1li':'lid','1lid':'lid','Lid':'lid','lid':'lid',
    'wW':'w','e,':'e','d.':'d','ne.':'ne',
    'n.':'n',
    'case':'case',
    'put all':'put all in case',
    'p':'put all in case',
}

common=set('n s e w u d ne nw se sw get take drop put open close move kill again ring read rub set lower raise wind pray dig board launch pump echo save drink wait look give show wave blow pour turn tie untie climb jump enter push pull fill y g'.split())

def normalize_bottom(s):
    s=re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9>, ._]',' ',s)
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    had=s.startswith('>')
    if had:
        s=s[1:].strip()
    s=s.rstrip('._').strip()
    if s in fixes:
        s=fixes[s]
    return s, had

lines=[]
for idx,p in enumerate(bottom5,1):
    raw=open(p,errors='ignore').read().strip()
    n,h=normalize_bottom(raw)
    lines.append({'idx':idx,'cmd':n,'had':h})

def is_commandlike(c):
    if not c:
        return False
    if len(c)>45:
        return False
    if not re.search(r'[A-Za-z]', c):
        return False
    parts=c.split()
    first=parts[0].lower().strip('.,') if parts else ''
    if first in common:
        return True
    if c.lower() in ['y','again','g']:
        return True
    if c in fixes.values():
        return True
    return False

segments=[]
cur=None
for r in lines:
    c=r['cmd']
    i=r['idx']
    if r['had'] and c:
        if cur is None:
            cur=(i,c)
        elif c.startswith(cur[1]) or (len(cur[1])>=3 and c.startswith(cur[1][:-1])):
            cur=(i,c)
        elif cur[1].startswith(c) and len(cur[1])-len(c)<=3:
            pass
        else:
            segments.append(cur)
            cur=(i,c)
    else:
        if cur:
            segments.append(cur)
            cur=None
if cur:
    segments.append(cur)

cmds=[]
for i,c in segments:
    c=fixes.get(c,c)
    if is_commandlike(c):
        cmds.append((i,c))

final=[]
for i,c in cmds:
    if final and final[-1][1]==c:
        continue
    final.append((i,c))

def b5_to_1fps(i):
    return max(1, min(190, (i+4)//5))

with open('/app/work/logs/dense_v5.log','w') as f:
    for n,(i,c) in enumerate(final,1):
        f.write(f'{n:03d} b5={i:05d} f={b5_to_1fps(i):03d} {c}\n')

print('dense_v5_count', len(final))
print('expected', 262)
print('match', len(final)==262)
print('first40', final[:40])
print('last40', final[-40:])
PY
python3 /app/work/dense_v5.py
wc -l /app/work/logs/dense_v5.log
sed -n '1,140p' /app/work/logs/dense_v5.log
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '141,320p' /app/work/logs/dense_v5.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '321,520p' /app/work/logs/dense_v5.log; tail -60 /app/work/logs/dense_v5.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
